TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci ÁŅľŚúįśēąśáČś©ü == yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci "Ground-effect vehicle" u sakay sasa nu lalaan mubahelay atu mubahelay nu balunga, u micukaymasay tu yi-ti-siaw-ing mubahelay a sapibahel nu kikayan, mipulung tu hikuki a sibaniay nu balungaan tu picidekan a sapibahel nu kikay. sakacaay ka lecad nu hikukian, mahiniay a sapibahel nu kikayan angangan u sakay sasa mubahel, u micapiay tu lalaan, nananuman mibahel, mangalay tu hamin nu demiad micukaymas tu yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci mikawaw, atu sibaniay a balunga tu sakacaay ka lecad, ya sibaniay nu balungaan u udip tu ku pabaliay, nika uyni u yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci u yi-ti-siaw-ing ku pabaniay. sakacaay kalecad nu babahelan nu kikayan itida sa micapi tu pinaay a cean hakiya tu pina nu bataan a cean nu talakaw ku nipibahel, acaay paceba sa misumad tu talakaw. ina pabanien nanay a balunga kanca kasasululan u yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci, tatengan caay kalecad ku sangan nu mahiniay a balungaan. ÁŅľŚúįśēąśáČś©ü(Ground-effect vehicle), . sakay bahel nu sangať£õŤ°ĆŚéüÁźÜ sapilaylayan a nipibahelan nu kikay micapi tu lala atu nanum mibahel sa, kaydaan nu bali i sakubat pasayda i nikudan ku bali, ayda u sasa atu nanum idaw ku naicelangan miwawies, silaad tu nanum mahida mikiadidiay tu 1/2 nu talakaw a mabahel, hamin nu balunga a uipan nu ba'ket macunus ku tabaki, sakatapabaw macunus, adidi ku sapiwawies, mamieputay tu sapibahel a kikayan ina sakubad mahetik. mihiniay a kikay taneng miwawies misaadidi' tu sapibahel, kya taneng mikikaka tu mabahelay i tapukuannanay a sapipuudaw nu u-li sin-sing, saan ku ke-sye-ciw tu mahiniay u yi-ti-siaw-ing, nikahinian idaw tu ku ti-siaw-hua-sin ngingicuan. . ing-yunśáČÁĒ® yu mahida namitaneng tu tu siw-se H-4 ta-li-sen, tatengan apuyu ku nibahelan mahetik tu. anganganan nu wenday i tawya nu hikuki tu sapihaka caay ka taneng. śó©ŚĻīÁöĄŚėóŤ©¶śúČšľĎśĖĮH-4 . tabakiay sakaynanum nu balungaanŚ§ßŚěčśįīÁ©ļŤČá caysiwwalsep mihcaan, naayaway a Su-len nikinkiwan nu nipatahekalan tu sediw sananay a cacuduhan nu yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci, u nikabahelan tu ba'ket makaala tu caysepsepsep kun-tun, yu mahida u malepacaway henay, ya amuhun nu kanatalan misuayaw tu Su-len tu nipakaycaculimekan mitanam tu mahiniay a nikabahelan caay kaw katinengan, uyda a cacay ku sakay " sakaylabu nu mahicaay i bayunanay a kuyuan" palecad han pangangan tu nu hitay a yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci. Śú®1980ŚĻīšĽ£, . sakay yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci tu nipisikian itida namin i nananuman, dayhan i nanum tu sakay lala kapah ku nikasadit inai' ku mamibatelu, anu caay cukaymasi, taneng henay sipakayda i nanum nu icelang ahemaw ku ba'ket, anu mubahel madayum. uli-yei-cia ci S-tan-li.Hu-ke' namusakamu tu micidekay nu tabaki, nu tadaba'ketay nu 2000 kun-tun a nadatengan tu yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci, mahiniay a balungaan taneng milakuuyt mitupin tu cacay a malebut nu tademawan, yasuy ku aca kalamkam ku nikatukuh i tataydaan. sadikuday nikinkiwan nu sulin caay tu kalaheci, tusa ku patelac nina yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci cacay sakaysasa' nu nananuman a hikukian, metalaw tu tabakiay nu cakepan, katalawan sawsawni mapatik nu cakep mucelem i bayu, tatenga itida i nikakapah nu bayuan sadikuday yadah ku malawpesay nu nipikinkiwan tu balungaan, sisa sikay bayuan u caayay ka kapah, anu sipitupin tu tuudan hakiya a katuud ku mapatayay, duma a sakalacus u nikaahecid nu bayuan mitai' tu i sasaay nu naman mubahelay nu hikukian a sapisanga, tawyaay a zayliw caay henay ka kapah. . nai'ay nu tademaw a hikukiÁĄ°šļļś©ü tusepcaypic mihcaan ina Cung-kuo hitay mapatahekal nu heni ku sakalecad nu kitidaan a sikalaheciay nai'ay nu tademawan a hikukian, nu ayawan mahida u cacayay nu mibalelihay a balungaan nu mabahelay a lacuna, saan ku duma nu kitakid mahiniay a nikatahekalan nu lalacuan u mamiedis tina hang-mu sakalepacaw nu balungaan u micidekay nu te-hua kakakuwangan, pulungen ku micidekay papatulinen. 2017 . sayaway mala u sakalawpesan a nai'ay nu tademawan, sakay bayuan nu ancin caay kaw sakaetiman, sakay tini i cakepan tunikahetikan taneng tu sa. sapiedisaw tu sakangaay itida i sapitupinaw caay kaw kapahay, mahiniay mitupinay nai' ku kakabalihenawan u ba'ket idaw ku nipikuleced tu nipipadengan tu ba'ketay nu lai-ta, u sapikisa nida u may-cun-tu-pu-le' lei-ta, mahiniay a lei-ta sapisiwwasiw tu i bayuay nu sakay amelikan tu sapitanengan, u tatesulan aw u basud sananay nu tayniay, u amelik nida makaalatu 200 ku sapitanaman, sakay sasaay mahaymaw ku culi nu sapipaadingan, sisa sipakayda i tapukuan tu sapipu't tu adaan idaw ku tuluay a kawawan: : sakacacay tada amilikay nu mubahelay a lacuna, kanahatu kadihan caay tu kalawa. sakatusa u sapihaliyud nu nipibahel putun han ku nipibahel, pacici hank u tapiingan misuayaw tu nikahedawan, dayhan nu mibahelay nu lacuna kya caay pakatepa. sakatulu isasaen ku nipibahel haymaw sa micapi. WIK Type A vr.jpg Á∑®ŤľĮ A-90 Orlyonok 1.JPG . huan-cin-mibahelay nu lacu a sakaysasa nu nai'ay nu tademawan a hikukian u sakatulu nu nipisumadan, adidiay makay sasaay a nipibahelan tu sakalaecus sa caay ka yadah ku nipitupin tu tuudan caay kataneng ku nipitupin tu sapibakuhac a lacuna tu sapibakudang tu balungaan,uyda u yi-ti-siaw-ing taneng miedap tuynian, u cacay nu lasubuan a batad nu i sasaay mitahaway sa, micapi tu lea-ta a sapibahbah nu balungaan atu hun-mu hedawen ku udip nu hikuki palaadidiay nu sunian nu balunga a amelikay nu lacuna, miedis tu sadikudayay nu micapiay tu lacuna. . yi-ti-siaw-ing " Wing-In-Ground effect,WIG" pangangan han tu "Ground effect" atu yi-men-siaw-ing "Wing-In-Surface-Effect,WISE" sapiwawies tu nikabahelan tu bali sapiwada tu nipicumud tu bali, kya taneng mikikaka tu nipibahelan tu nipiwawies a niculilan tu liw-ti-sye-siaw-in: milaylay ku sapibahel a kikayan micapitu lala' atu nanum, nu nikatapabawan atu nikatasasaan macunus ku tabaki, sakatapabaw kasenusa macunu. nu ayawan nu Su-len u mahiniay ku cukaymasen, kinapina tu mikinkiw tu mahiniay yi-ti-siaw-ing sapibahel tatenga mikinkiw tu nipibahelan. ÁŅľŚúįśēąśáČ(Wing-In-Ground effect, WIG) (Wing-In-Surface-Effect, WISE), . mahiniay nu hikukian atu sapisetset a kadidenga a culil nu bali malalid nu sasa' atu nanum, sa mahini.mahiniay a kawawan tusa ku cacukaymasan: sapisetset a kadideng nipisikian i sasa nu kadidengan pasayda i sasa ku bali, sapicunus tu sakakapah nu muli, kya midepit i lala' ku kadideng sa. . yi-ti-siaw-ing palalekalanÁŅľŚúįśēąśáČÁĒĘÁĒüÁöĄŚéüŚõ† yi-ti-siaw-ing palalekalan itida i u'-li masasetset henay, saan nu yi-ti-siaw-ing u sakay balian itida i sakubad atu sasa nanum malatalakaway nu sibaniay tu nikatabakiay nu icelangan. nika nikinkiwan tu bali idaw ku sasulitan, saan ku nikatahekalan tu talakaway a banian idaw tu sa, nika sakaysasa nananuman anganganan u sapilawlaw tu yi-cin adiyuc. kanai'an henay nu yi-cin adiyucan, kalimucu' nu sakubadan taneng micapitu nanakamuan, sipakayda kapah ku nipibahel nu hikuki. . yi-ti-siaw-ing hicaen misuayaw ku hikuki a mikawa dayhan sakalecad nu amelik atu sacuduh, micapiay tu nipibahelan nu yi-ti-siaw-ing u udip idaw ku tabakiay a nipicuduhan. sisa ina yi-ti-siaw-ing taneng misatalakaw tu micapiay tu nipibahel nu hikuki a sibalan. nika hucunu hikuki itidasa i pibahelan atu kadebuan micapi tu lala', itini sa a cacay kapah ku sakay yi-ti-siaw-ing. masasetset ku kadideng, misangaay tu kadideng a tademaw kaisa tu tapabaway uyda kuhan u tasasaay. micukaymas tu culil nu bali a nikatasasaan, yu sapisetset nu kadideng anu mungangnw kya mahida tu ku talakaw nu amelki. mangalay a talakaw ku sapicelang, u kadideng atu sasaay bali miwad tu bali. micukaymas tu puo-li-tin-li, miwada tu tatamudungan malatusa ku kakawaw. duma micukaymas tu sasa nu kadideng nipisikian pacici han pacumud i sasa nu kadideng a bali malakakenisan atu caculil nu bali nu sasa a kadidengan, anu amelik ku culil nu bali u sapipenec mawada. .

¶ak…ôpan tunikańß…ôtikan tan…ôŇč tu sa. sapi…ôdisaw tu sakaŇčaaj itida i sapitupinaw ¶aaj kaw kapańßaj, mańßiniaj mitupinaj nai Ē~ ° ku kakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan u ba Ē~ °k…ôt idaw ku nipikur~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôd tu nipipad…ôŇčan tu ba Ē~ °k…ôtaj nu r~…ĺai-ta, u sapikisa nida u maj- ¶un-tu-pu-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ ° r~…ĺ…ôi-ta, mańßiniaj a r~…ĺ…ôi-ta sapisiwwasiw tu i bajuaj nu sakaj am…ôr~…ĺikan tu sapitan…ôŇčan, u tat…ôsur~…ĺan aw u basud sananaj nu tajniaj, u am…ôr~…ĺik nida makaar~…ĺatu *** ku sapitanaman, sakaj sasaaj mańßajmaw ku ¶ur~…ĺi nu sapipaadiŇčan, sisa sipakajda i tapukuan tu sapipu Ē~ °t tu adaan idaw ku tur~…ĺuaj a kawawan: : saka ¶a ¶aj tada amir~…ĺikaj nu mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj a r~…ĺa ¶una, kanańßatu kadińßan ¶aaj tu kar~…ĺawa. sakatusa u sapińßar~…ĺijud nu nipibańß…ôr~…ĺ putun ńßan ku nipibańß…ôr~…ĺ, pa ¶i ¶i ńßank u tapiiŇčan misuajaw tu nikańß…ôdawan, dajńßan nu mibańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺa ¶una kja ¶aaj pakat…ôpa. sakatur~…ĺu isasa…ôn ku nipibańß…ôr~…ĺ ńßajmaw sa mi ¶api. wik tjp…ô a *r.jpg ** a-** orr~…ĺjonok *.*pg . ńßuan- ¶in-mibańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺa ¶u a sakajsasa nu nai Ē~ °aj nu tad…ômawan a ńßikukian u sakatur~…ĺu nu nipisumadan, adidiaj makaj sasaaj a nipibańß…ôr~…ĺan tu sakar~…ĺa…ô ¶us sa ¶aaj ka jadańß ku nipitupin tu tuudan ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku nipitupin tu sapibakuńßa ¶ a r~…ĺa ¶una tu sapibakudaŇč tu bar~…ĺuŇčaan,ujda u ji-ti-siaw-iŇč tan…ôŇč mi…ôdap tujnian, u ¶a ¶aj nu r~…ĺasubuan a batad nu i sasaaj mitańßawaj sa, mi ¶api tu r~…ĺ…ôa-ta a sapibańßbańß nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan atu ńßun-mu ńß…ôdaw…ôn ku udip nu ńßikuki par~…ĺaadidiaj nu sunian nu bar~…ĺuŇča a am…ôr~…ĺikaj nu r~…ĺa ¶una, mi…ôdis tu sadikudajaj nu mi ¶apiaj tu r~…ĺa ¶una. . ji-ti-siaw-iŇč " wiŇč-in-ground …ôff…ô ¶t,wig" paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "ground …ôff…ô ¶t" atu ji-m…ôn-siaw-iŇč "wiŇč-in-surfa ¶…ô-…ôff…ô ¶t,wis…ô" sapiwawi…ôs tu nikabańß…ôr~…ĺan tu bar~…ĺi sapiwada tu nipi ¶umud tu bar~…ĺi, kja tan…ôŇč mikikaka tu nipibańß…ôr~…ĺan tu nipiwawi…ôs a ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan tu r~…ĺiw-ti-sj…ô-siaw-in: mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ku sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ a kikajan mi ¶apitu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu nanum, nu nikatapabawan atu nikatasasaan ma ¶unus ku tabaki, sakatapabaw kas…ônusa ma ¶unu. nu ajawan nu su-r~…ĺ…ôn u mańßiniaj ku ¶ukajmas…ôn, kinapina tu mikinkiw tu mańßiniaj ji-ti-siaw-iŇč sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ tat…ôŇča mikinkiw tu nipibańß…ôr~…ĺan. ****(wiŇč-in-ground …ôff…ô ¶t, wig) (wiŇč-in-surfa ¶…ô-…ôff…ô ¶t, wis…ô), . mańßiniaj nu ńßikukian atu sapis…ôts…ôt a kadid…ôŇča a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺi mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu sasa Ē~ ° atu nanum, sa mańßini.mańßiniaj a kawawan tusa ku ¶a ¶ukajmasan: sapis…ôts…ôt a kadid…ôŇč nipisikian i sasa nu kadid…ôŇčan pasajda i sasa ku bar~…ĺi, sapi ¶unus tu sakakapańß nu mur~…ĺi, kja mid…ôpit i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku kadid…ôŇč sa. . ji-ti-siaw-iŇč par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan********* ji-ti-siaw-iŇč par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan itida i u Ē~ °-r~…ĺi masas…ôts…ôt ńß…ônaj, saan nu ji-ti-siaw-iŇč u sakaj bar~…ĺian itida i sakubad atu sasa nanum mar~…ĺatar~…ĺakawaj nu sibaniaj tu nikatabakiaj nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. nika nikinkiwan tu bar~…ĺi idaw ku sasur~…ĺitan, saan ku nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu tar~…ĺakawaj a banian idaw tu sa, nika sakajsasa nananuman aŇčaŇčanan u sapir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu ji- ¶in adiju ¶. kanai Ē~ °an ńß…ônaj nu ji- ¶in adiju ¶an, kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° nu sakubadan tan…ôŇč mi ¶apitu nanakamuan, sipakajda kapańß ku nipibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu ńßikuki. . ji-ti-siaw-iŇč ńßi ¶a…ôn misuajaw ku ńßikuki a mikawa dajńßan sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu am…ôr~…ĺik atu sa ¶uduńß, mi ¶apiaj tu nipibańß…ôr~…ĺan nu ji-ti-siaw-iŇč u udip idaw ku tabakiaj a nipi ¶uduńßan. sisa ina ji-ti-siaw-iŇč tan…ôŇč misatar~…ĺakaw tu mi ¶apiaj tu nipibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu ńßikuki a sibar~…ĺan. nika ńßu ¶unu ńßikuki itidasa i pibańß…ôr~…ĺan atu kad…ôbuan mi ¶api tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, itini sa a ¶a ¶aj kapańß ku sakaj ji-ti-siaw-iŇč. masas…ôts…ôt ku kadid…ôŇč, misaŇčaaj tu kadid…ôŇč a tad…ômaw kaisa tu tapabawaj ujda kuńßan u tasasaaj. mi ¶ukajmas tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺi a nikatasasaan, ju sapis…ôts…ôt nu kadid…ôŇč anu muŇčaŇčnw kja mańßida tu ku tar~…ĺakaw nu am…ôr~…ĺki. maŇčar~…ĺaj a tar~…ĺakaw ku sapi ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, u kadid…ôŇč atu sasaaj bar~…ĺi miwad tu bar~…ĺi. mi ¶ukajmas tu puo-r~…ĺi-tin-r~…ĺi, miwada tu tatamuduŇčan mar~…ĺatusa ku kakawaw. duma mi ¶ukajmas tu sasa nu kadid…ôŇč nipisikian pa ¶i ¶i ńßan pa ¶umud i sasa nu kadid…ôŇč a bar~…ĺi mar~…ĺakak…ônisan atu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺi nu sasa a kadid…ôŇčan, anu am…ôr~…ĺik ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺi u sapip…ôn…ô ¶ mawada. .
S.FORM: == yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci ÁŅľŚúįśēąśáČś©ü == yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci "Ground-effect vehicle" u sakay sasa nu lalaan mubahelay atu mubahelay nu balunga, u micukaymasay tu yi-ti-siaw-ing mubahelay a sapibahel nu kikayan, mipulung tu hikuki a sibaniay nu balungaan tu picidekan a sapibahel nu kikay. sakacaay ka lecad nu hikukian, mahiniay a sapibahel nu kikayan angangan u sakay sasa mubahel, u micapiay tu lalaan, nananuman mibahel, mangalay tu hamin nu demiad micukaymas tu yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci mikawaw, atu sibaniay a balunga tu sakacaay ka lecad, ya sibaniay nu balungaan u udip tu ku pabaliay, nika uyni u yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci u yi-ti-siaw-ing ku pabaniay. sakacaay kalecad nu babahelan nu kikayan itida sa micapi tu pinaay a cean hakiya tu pina nu bataan a cean nu talakaw ku nipibahel, acaay paceba sa misumad tu talakaw. ina pabanien nanay a balunga kanca kasasululan u yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci, tatengan caay kalecad ku sangan nu mahiniay a balungaan. ÁŅľŚúįśēąśáČś©ü(Ground-effect vehicle), . sakay bahel nu sangať£õŤ°ĆŚéüÁźÜ sapilaylayan a nipibahelan nu kikay micapi tu lala atu nanum mibahel sa, kaydaan nu bali i sakubat pasayda i nikudan ku bali, ayda u sasa atu nanum idaw ku naicelangan miwawies, silaad tu nanum mahida mikiadidiay tu 1/2 nu talakaw a mabahel, hamin nu balunga a uipan nu ba'ket macunus ku tabaki, sakatapabaw macunus, adidi ku sapiwawies, mamieputay tu sapibahel a kikayan ina sakubad mahetik. mihiniay a kikay taneng miwawies misaadidi' tu sapibahel, kya taneng mikikaka tu mabahelay i tapukuannanay a sapipuudaw nu u-li sin-sing, saan ku ke-sye-ciw tu mahiniay u yi-ti-siaw-ing, nikahinian idaw tu ku ti-siaw-hua-sin ngingicuan. . ing-yunśáČÁĒ® yu mahida namitaneng tu tu siw-se H-4 ta-li-sen, tatengan apuyu ku nibahelan mahetik tu. anganganan nu wenday i tawya nu hikuki tu sapihaka caay ka taneng. śó©ŚĻīÁöĄŚėóŤ©¶śúČšľĎśĖĮH-4 . tabakiay sakaynanum nu balungaanŚ§ßŚěčśįīÁ©ļŤČá caysiwwalsep mihcaan, naayaway a Su-len nikinkiwan nu nipatahekalan tu sediw sananay a cacuduhan nu yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci, u nikabahelan tu ba'ket makaala tu caysepsepsep kun-tun, yu mahida u malepacaway henay, ya amuhun nu kanatalan misuayaw tu Su-len tu nipakaycaculimekan mitanam tu mahiniay a nikabahelan caay kaw katinengan, uyda a cacay ku sakay " sakaylabu nu mahicaay i bayunanay a kuyuan" palecad han pangangan tu nu hitay a yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci. Śú®1980ŚĻīšĽ£, . sakay yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci tu nipisikian itida namin i nananuman, dayhan i nanum tu sakay lala kapah ku nikasadit inai' ku mamibatelu, anu caay cukaymasi, taneng henay sipakayda i nanum nu icelang ahemaw ku ba'ket, anu mubahel madayum. uli-yei-cia ci S-tan-li.Hu-ke' namusakamu tu micidekay nu tabaki, nu tadaba'ketay nu 2000 kun-tun a nadatengan tu yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci, mahiniay a balungaan taneng milakuuyt mitupin tu cacay a malebut nu tademawan, yasuy ku aca kalamkam ku nikatukuh i tataydaan. sadikuday nikinkiwan nu sulin caay tu kalaheci, tusa ku patelac nina yi-ti-siaw-ing-ci cacay sakaysasa' nu nananuman a hikukian, metalaw tu tabakiay nu cakepan, katalawan sawsawni mapatik nu cakep mucelem i bayu, tatenga itida i nikakapah nu bayuan sadikuday yadah ku malawpesay nu nipikinkiwan tu balungaan, sisa sikay bayuan u caayay ka kapah, anu sipitupin tu tuudan hakiya a katuud ku mapatayay, duma a sakalacus u nikaahecid nu bayuan mitai' tu i sasaay nu naman mubahelay nu hikukian a sapisanga, tawyaay a zayliw caay henay ka kapah. . nai'ay nu tademaw a hikukiÁĄ°šļļś©ü tusepcaypic mihcaan ina Cung-kuo hitay mapatahekal nu heni ku sakalecad nu kitidaan a sikalaheciay nai'ay nu tademawan a hikukian, nu ayawan mahida u cacayay nu mibalelihay a balungaan nu mabahelay a lacuna, saan ku duma nu kitakid mahiniay a nikatahekalan nu lalacuan u mamiedis tina hang-mu sakalepacaw nu balungaan u micidekay nu te-hua kakakuwangan, pulungen ku micidekay papatulinen. 2017 . sayaway mala u sakalawpesan a nai'ay nu tademawan, sakay bayuan nu ancin caay kaw sakaetiman, sakay tini i cakepan tunikahetikan taneng tu sa. sapiedisaw tu sakangaay itida i sapitupinaw caay kaw kapahay, mahiniay mitupinay nai' ku kakabalihenawan u ba'ket idaw ku nipikuleced tu nipipadengan tu ba'ketay nu lai-ta, u sapikisa nida u may-cun-tu-pu-le' lei-ta, mahiniay a lei-ta sapisiwwasiw tu i bayuay nu sakay amelikan tu sapitanengan, u tatesulan aw u basud sananay nu tayniay, u amelik nida makaalatu 200 ku sapitanaman, sakay sasaay mahaymaw ku culi nu sapipaadingan, sisa sipakayda i tapukuan tu sapipu't tu adaan idaw ku tuluay a kawawan: : sakacacay tada amilikay nu mubahelay a lacuna, kanahatu kadihan caay tu kalawa. sakatusa u sapihaliyud nu nipibahel putun han ku nipibahel, pacici hank u tapiingan misuayaw tu nikahedawan, dayhan nu mibahelay nu lacuna kya caay pakatepa. sakatulu isasaen ku nipibahel haymaw sa micapi. WIK Type A vr.jpg Á∑®ŤľĮ A-90 Orlyonok 1.JPG . huan-cin-mibahelay nu lacu a sakaysasa nu nai'ay nu tademawan a hikukian u sakatulu nu nipisumadan, adidiay makay sasaay a nipibahelan tu sakalaecus sa caay ka yadah ku nipitupin tu tuudan caay kataneng ku nipitupin tu sapibakuhac a lacuna tu sapibakudang tu balungaan,uyda u yi-ti-siaw-ing taneng miedap tuynian, u cacay nu lasubuan a batad nu i sasaay mitahaway sa, micapi tu lea-ta a sapibahbah nu balungaan atu hun-mu hedawen ku udip nu hikuki palaadidiay nu sunian nu balunga a amelikay nu lacuna, miedis tu sadikudayay nu micapiay tu lacuna. . yi-ti-siaw-ing " Wing-In-Ground effect,WIG" pangangan han tu "Ground effect" atu yi-men-siaw-ing "Wing-In-Surface-Effect,WISE" sapiwawies tu nikabahelan tu bali sapiwada tu nipicumud tu bali, kya taneng mikikaka tu nipibahelan tu nipiwawies a niculilan tu liw-ti-sye-siaw-in: milaylay ku sapibahel a kikayan micapitu lala' atu nanum, nu nikatapabawan atu nikatasasaan macunus ku tabaki, sakatapabaw kasenusa macunu. nu ayawan nu Su-len u mahiniay ku cukaymasen, kinapina tu mikinkiw tu mahiniay yi-ti-siaw-ing sapibahel tatenga mikinkiw tu nipibahelan. ÁŅľŚúįśēąśáČ(Wing-In-Ground effect, WIG) (Wing-In-Surface-Effect, WISE), . mahiniay nu hikukian atu sapisetset a kadidenga a culil nu bali malalid nu sasa' atu nanum, sa mahini.mahiniay a kawawan tusa ku cacukaymasan: sapisetset a kadideng nipisikian i sasa nu kadidengan pasayda i sasa ku bali, sapicunus tu sakakapah nu muli, kya midepit i lala' ku kadideng sa. . yi-ti-siaw-ing palalekalanÁŅľŚúįśēąśáČÁĒĘÁĒüÁöĄŚéüŚõ† yi-ti-siaw-ing palalekalan itida i u'-li masasetset henay, saan nu yi-ti-siaw-ing u sakay balian itida i sakubad atu sasa nanum malatalakaway nu sibaniay tu nikatabakiay nu icelangan. nika nikinkiwan tu bali idaw ku sasulitan, saan ku nikatahekalan tu talakaway a banian idaw tu sa, nika sakaysasa nananuman anganganan u sapilawlaw tu yi-cin adiyuc. kanai'an henay nu yi-cin adiyucan, kalimucu' nu sakubadan taneng micapitu nanakamuan, sipakayda kapah ku nipibahel nu hikuki. . yi-ti-siaw-ing hicaen misuayaw ku hikuki a mikawa dayhan sakalecad nu amelik atu sacuduh, micapiay tu nipibahelan nu yi-ti-siaw-ing u udip idaw ku tabakiay a nipicuduhan. sisa ina yi-ti-siaw-ing taneng misatalakaw tu micapiay tu nipibahel nu hikuki a sibalan. nika hucunu hikuki itidasa i pibahelan atu kadebuan micapi tu lala', itini sa a cacay kapah ku sakay yi-ti-siaw-ing. masasetset ku kadideng, misangaay tu kadideng a tademaw kaisa tu tapabaway uyda kuhan u tasasaay. micukaymas tu culil nu bali a nikatasasaan, yu sapisetset nu kadideng anu mungangnw kya mahida tu ku talakaw nu amelki. mangalay a talakaw ku sapicelang, u kadideng atu sasaay bali miwad tu bali. micukaymas tu puo-li-tin-li, miwada tu tatamudungan malatusa ku kakawaw. duma micukaymas tu sasa nu kadideng nipisikian pacici han pacumud i sasa nu kadideng a bali malakakenisan atu caculil nu bali nu sasa a kadidengan, anu amelik ku culil nu bali u sapipenec mawada. .
S.PHON: == ji-ti-siaw-iŇč- ¶i ***** == ji-ti-siaw-iŇč- ¶i "ground-…ôff…ô ¶t *…ôńßi ¶r~…ĺ…ô" u sakaj sasa nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaan mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj atu mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča, u mi ¶ukajmasaj tu ji-ti-siaw-iŇč mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu kikajan, mipur~…ĺuŇč tu ńßikuki a sibaniaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan tu pi ¶id…ôkan a sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu kikaj. saka ¶aaj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu ńßikukian, mańßiniaj a itida namin i nananuman, dajńßan i nanum tu sakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺa kapańß ku nikasadit inai Ē~ ° ku mamibat…ôr~…ĺu, anu ¶aaj ¶ukajmasi, tan…ôŇč ńß…ônaj sipakajda i nanum nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ańß…ômaw ku ba Ē~ °k…ôt, anu mubańß…ôr~…ĺ madajum. ur~…ĺi-j…ôi- ¶ia ¶i s-tan-r~…ĺi.ńßu-k…ô Ē~ ° namusakamu tu mi ¶id…ôkaj nu tabaki, nu tadaba Ē~ °k…ôtaj nu **** kun-tun a nadat…ôŇčan tu ji-ti-siaw-iŇč- ¶i, mańßiniaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺakuujt mitupin tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu tad…ômawan, jasuj ku a ¶a kar~…ĺamkam ku nikatukuńß i tatajdaan. sadikudaj nikinkiwan nu sur~…ĺin ¶aaj tu kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, tusa ku ¶us u nikaańß…ô ¶id nu bajuan mitai Ē~ ° tu i sasaaj nu naman mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu ńßikukian a sapisaŇča, tawjaaj a zajr~…ĺiw ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka kapańß. . nai Ē~ °aj nu tad…ômaw a ńßikuki*** tus…ôp ¶ajpi ¶ mińß ¶aan ina ¶uŇč-kuo ńßitaj mapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu ńß…ôni ku sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kitidaan a sikar~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj nai Ē~ °aj nu tad…ômawan a ńßikukian, nu ajawan mańßida u ¶a ¶ajaj nu mibar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺińßaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan nu mabańß…ôr~…ĺaj a r~…ĺa ¶una, saan ku duma nu kitakid mańßiniaj a nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶uan u mami…ôdis tina ńßaŇč-mu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan u mi ¶id…ôkaj nu ¶ak…ôpan tunikańß…ôtikan tan…ôŇč tu sa. sapi…ôdisaw tu sakaŇčaaj itida i sapitupinaw ¶aaj kaw kapańßaj, mańßiniaj mitupinaj nai Ē~ ° ku kakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan u ba Ē~ °k…ôt idaw ku nipikur~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôd tu nipipad…ôŇčan tu ba Ē~ °k…ôtaj nu r~…ĺai-ta, u sapikisa nida u maj- ¶un-tu-pu-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ ° r~…ĺ…ôi-ta, mańßiniaj a r~…ĺ…ôi-ta sapisiwwasiw tu i bajuaj nu sakaj am…ôr~…ĺikan tu sapitan…ôŇčan, u tat…ôsur~…ĺan aw u basud sananaj nu tajniaj, u am…ôr~…ĺik nida makaar~…ĺatu *** ku sapitanaman, sakaj sasaaj mańßajmaw ku ¶ur~…ĺi nu sapipaadiŇčan, sisa sipakajda i tapukuan tu sapipu Ē~ °t tu adaan idaw ku tur~…ĺuaj a kawawan: : saka ¶a ¶aj tada amir~…ĺikaj nu mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj a r~…ĺa ¶una, kanańßatu kadińßan ¶aaj tu kar~…ĺawa. sakatusa u sapińßar~…ĺijud nu nipibańß…ôr~…ĺ putun ńßan ku nipibańß…ôr~…ĺ, pa ¶i ¶i ńßank u tapiiŇčan misuajaw tu nikańß…ôdawan, dajńßan nu mibańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺa ¶una kja ¶aaj pakat…ôpa. sakatur~…ĺu isasa…ôn ku nipibańß…ôr~…ĺ ńßajmaw sa mi ¶api. wik tjp…ô a *r.jpg ** a-** orr~…ĺjonok *.*pg . ńßuan- ¶in-mibańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺa ¶u a sakajsasa nu nai Ē~ °aj nu tad…ômawan a ńßikukian u sakatur~…ĺu nu nipisumadan, adidiaj makaj sasaaj a nipibańß…ôr~…ĺan tu sakar~…ĺa…ô ¶us sa ¶aaj ka jadańß ku nipitupin tu tuudan ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku nipitupin tu sapibakuńßa ¶ a r~…ĺa ¶una tu sapibakudaŇč tu bar~…ĺuŇčaan,ujda u ji-ti-siaw-iŇč tan…ôŇč mi…ôdap tujnian, u ¶a ¶aj nu r~…ĺasubuan a batad nu i sasaaj mitańßawaj sa, mi ¶api tu r~…ĺ…ôa-ta a sapibańßbańß nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan atu ńßun-mu ńß…ôdaw…ôn ku udip nu ńßikuki par~…ĺaadidiaj nu sunian nu bar~…ĺuŇča a am…ôr~…ĺikaj nu r~…ĺa ¶una, mi…ôdis tu sadikudajaj nu mi ¶apiaj tu r~…ĺa ¶una. . ji-ti-siaw-iŇč " wiŇč-in-ground …ôff…ô ¶t,wig" paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "ground …ôff…ô ¶t" atu ji-m…ôn-siaw-iŇč "wiŇč-in-surfa ¶…ô-…ôff…ô ¶t,wis…ô" sapiwawi…ôs tu nikabańß…ôr~…ĺan tu bar~…ĺi sapiwada tu nipi ¶umud tu bar~…ĺi, kja tan…ôŇč mikikaka tu nipibańß…ôr~…ĺan tu nipiwawi…ôs a ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan tu r~…ĺiw-ti-sj…ô-siaw-in: mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ku sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ a kikajan mi ¶apitu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu nanum, nu nikatapabawan atu nikatasasaan ma ¶unus ku tabaki, sakatapabaw kas…ônusa ma ¶unu. nu ajawan nu su-r~…ĺ…ôn u mańßiniaj ku ¶ukajmas…ôn, kinapina tu mikinkiw tu mańßiniaj ji-ti-siaw-iŇč sapibańß…ôr~…ĺ tat…ôŇča mikinkiw tu nipibańß…ôr~…ĺan. ****(wiŇč-in-ground …ôff…ô ¶t, wig) (wiŇč-in-surfa ¶…ô-…ôff…ô ¶t, wis…ô), . mańßiniaj nu ńßikukian atu sapis…ôts…ôt a kadid…ôŇča a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺi mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu sasa Ē~ ° atu nanum, sa mańßini.mańßiniaj a kawawan tusa ku ¶a ¶ukajmasan: sapis…ôts…ôt a kadid…ôŇč nipisikian i sasa nu kadid…ôŇčan pasajda i sasa ku bar~…ĺi, sapi ¶unus tu sakakapańß nu mur~…ĺi, kja mid…ôpit i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku kadid…ôŇč sa. . ji-ti-siaw-iŇč par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan********* ji-ti-siaw-iŇč par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan itida i u Ē~ °-r~…ĺi masas…ôts…ôt ńß…ônaj, saan nu ji-ti-siaw-iŇč u sakaj bar~…ĺian itida i sakubad atu sasa nanum mar~…ĺatar~…ĺakawaj nu sibaniaj tu nikatabakiaj nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. nika nikinkiwan tu bar~…ĺi idaw ku sasur~…ĺitan, saan ku nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu tar~…ĺakawaj a banian idaw tu sa, nika sakajsasa nananuman aŇčaŇčanan u sapir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu ji- ¶in adiju ¶. kanai Ē~ °an ńß…ônaj nu ji- ¶in adiju ¶an, kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° nu sakubadan tan…ôŇč mi ¶apitu nanakamuan, sipakajda kapańß ku nipibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu ńßikuki. . ji-ti-siaw-iŇč ńßi ¶a…ôn misuajaw ku ńßikuki a mikawa dajńßan sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu am…ôr~…ĺik atu sa ¶uduńß, mi ¶apiaj tu nipibańß…ôr~…ĺan nu ji-ti-siaw-iŇč u udip idaw ku tabakiaj a nipi ¶uduńßan. sisa ina ji-ti-siaw-iŇč tan…ôŇč misatar~…ĺakaw tu mi ¶apiaj tu nipibańß…ôr~…ĺ nu ńßikuki a sibar~…ĺan. nika ńßu ¶unu ńßikuki itidasa i pibańß…ôr~…ĺan atu kad…ôbuan mi ¶api tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, itini sa a ¶a ¶aj kapańß ku sakaj ji-ti-siaw-iŇč. masas…ôts…ôt ku kadid…ôŇč, misaŇčaaj tu kadid…ôŇč a tad…ômaw kaisa tu tapabawaj ujda kuńßan u tasasaaj. mi ¶ukajmas tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺi a nikatasasaan, ju sapis…ôts…ôt nu kadid…ôŇč anu muŇčaŇčnw kja mańßida tu ku tar~…ĺakaw nu am…ôr~…ĺki. maŇčar~…ĺaj a tar~…ĺakaw ku sapi ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, u kadid…ôŇč atu sasaaj bar~…ĺi miwad tu bar~…ĺi. mi ¶ukajmas tu puo-r~…ĺi-tin-r~…ĺi, miwada tu tatamuduŇčan mar~…ĺatusa ku kakawaw. duma mi ¶ukajmas tu sasa nu kadid…ôŇč nipisikian pa ¶i ¶i ńßan pa ¶umud i sasa nu kadid…ôŇč a bar~…ĺi mar~…ĺakak…ônisan atu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺi nu sasa a kadid…ôŇčan, anu am…ôr~…ĺik ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺi u sapip…ôn…ô ¶ mawada. .
